arts.ttl: Inside Man City's FFP charges hearing as 'bombshell moments' predicted amid Newcastle concern
arts.sum: Manchester City fans have been cautioned not to hold their breath for extensive details emerging from the ongoing Premier League hearing in London. Yet, former Everton CEO Keith Wyness, in conversation with Football Insider, suggested that further information will be scarce: "The secret location was leaked, there were photographs of the lawyers going in and the lead lawyer, David Pannick, is reportedly on £5,000 per-hour.

arts.ttl: Marco Silva outlines demands to Fulham stars after "frustrating" double blow
arts.sum: Fulham were dumped out of the Carabao Cup in midweek after losing in the longest penalty shootout in the competition's history - days after conceding a late equaliser to West Ham

arts.ttl: Referee who saved Bruno and shocked Shearer last season in charge of Newcastle's clash with Fulham
arts.sum: Peter Bankes has been appointed as the man in the middle for the Magpies trip to London this weekend, with Eddie Smart and Nick Greenhalgh his assistants, while Leigh Doughty will be the the fourth official and Rob Jones n VAR, with his assistant Mark Scholes. Bankes gave the Newcastle man a final warning and Eddie Howe's side were fortunate to see the game out with 11 men, though did squander a 2-1 lead in the dying embers of the game.

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all eight games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League continues this weekend and Tom Hill has highlighted our writers' best bets for all eight matches taking place on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Team News: Fulham vs. Newcastle United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Fulham and Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: ‘I heard’: Transfer insider drops fresh Newcastle claim as decision made on ‘world-class’ 2025 free agent
arts.sum: Leroy Sane’s situation is sure to be garnering attention across Europe as he gradually nears the end of his current contract at Bayern Munich. The Germany international’s current terms are set to expire in the summer of 2025, which more than explains why some of England’s top clubs have kept a watching brief. arts.ttl: 'Not going there', Eddie Howe not prepared to answer questions on Paul Mitchell silence
arts.sum: So I’m in regular communication with them, trying to collaborate and work together for the benefit of the club. A follow-up question then queried if there has been any fresh talk to which Howe said: "I think I’ve just answered that one.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak injury: Eddie Howe says who could replace doubtful Newcastle striker
arts.sum: Newcastle United manager Eddie Howe provides an injury update on strikers Alexander Isak and Callum Wilson ahead of Saturday's Premier League trip to Fulham.

arts.ttl: Liverpool suffer Anthony Gordon setback as Newcastle weigh up record contract offer
arts.sum: Newcastle winger Anthony Gordon was the subject of transfer interest from Liverpool in the summer but the England star could now be in line for a bumper pay day with his current club
